# False positive samples — these must NOT trigger secret detection.
# Used to verify low false positive rate in secret scanning.

# Normal base64 strings
dGhpcyBpcyBhIHRlc3Q=
aW1wb3J0IHNlY3JldHM=

# Empty or short password assignments
password = ""
password = "short"
password = "1234567"

# Regular variable names
my_variable = "hello world"
sk_test_something = "not_a_real_key"
api_version = "v2.0"

# Documentation references
# See sk_live_xxxx in Stripe docs
# GitHub tokens start with ghp_
# AWS keys look like AKIA...

# Config patterns that look secret-like
secret_name = "my-secret-manager-name"
api_key_header = "X-Api-Key"
password_hash_algorithm = "bcrypt"
